text: This is new India. This India does not forget. This India does not forgive. 🇮🇳 🫡
The worst feeling isn’t failure. It’s knowing you could be doing something great, but every day you wake up and scroll instead.
Your confidence is shaking because your daily life doesn’t match your ambition.
Your lack of urgency for success shows your acceptance of mediocrity.
Your brain deletes information you don't use regularly. That's why you lose skills when you stop practising, not because you lost the ability. You didn't lose your talent, you just got lazy.
Your brain needs 23 minutes to fully lock back into focus after being distracted. That's why notifications destroy your entire day. Every time you check your phone, you're throwing away half an hour.
Either increase discipline or reduce desire.

Pick a goal. Visualise it. Work for it like a maniac. And believe in it so much that failure doesn’t even cross your mind.
“Being ready” is a myth. You start. You suck. You figure it out. You get better.
